```{=html}
<aside class="side-panel glossary-sidebar">
<details open>
<summary>Glossary</summary>
<dl>
  <dt><code>S<sub>t</sub></code>, <code>P</code></dt>
  <dd>Token spot (USD/kVCM) and protocol constant (kVCM/tonne).
  Carbon price: <code>π<sub>t</sub> = P·S<sub>t</sub></code>.</dd>

  <dt><code>I<sub>T</sub> = ∫₀<sup>T</sup> S<sub>t</sub> dt</code></dt>
  <dd>Shared random kernel. Fee revenue enters with +, principal books with −.</dd>

  <dt>Coverage <code>τ</code></dt>
  <dd>Fraction of the horizon pre-bought inventory lasts,
  <code>min(1, k/(N·P))</code>. Model calls this <code>α</code>.</dd>

  <dt>VaR<sub>95</sub> / CVaR<sub>95</sub></dt>
  <dd>5% loss threshold / mean loss inside that tail.
  On the fee book: "low end of revenue", not loss.</dd>

  <dt>Fee / principal book</dt>
  <dd>Fee: markup <code>f·π<sub>t</sub></code>, no inventory.
  Principal: fixed quote <code>Q</code>, five variants (matched,
  back-to-back, partial, syndicated, switching).</dd>
</dl>
</details>
</aside>
```
